services.name: Azure Front Door
services.description: Routes shopper traffic to the nearest healthy region

services.name: App Service
services.description: Hosts the e-commerce web and API application

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Processes order events and performs backend workflow steps

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Stores the global product catalog and order state

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Caches user sessions and frequently accessed shopping data

services.name: Azure Event Grid
services.description: Publishes order events for asynchronous processing

services.name: Key Vault
services.description: Stores application secrets and cryptographic material

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects application health and telemetry signals

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Centralizes logs and supports operational analysis

connections.label: Route shopper traffic to the nearest healthy region
Redirect users for sign-in and receive authentication tokens
Retrieve connection secrets and signing keys at runtime
Read and refresh customer session state for fast checkout
Read the global product catalog and pricing data
Publish order placed events for downstream fulfillment
Trigger backend order processing when a new event arrives
Persist order state and update inventory records
Invalidate or update cached session and cart data after checkout
Resolve secrets needed for fulfillment integrations
Emit application telemetry and request metrics
Store logs and diagnostics for operational analysis

workflow.description: A shopper enters the site through the global edge and is routed to the healthiest regional application instance.
The application authenticates the user with Microsoft Entra ID and retrieves runtime secrets from Key Vault.
The application restores the customer session from Redis Cache and reads the latest product catalog from Cosmos DB.
When the customer places an order, the application publishes an order event to Event Grid.
Event Grid triggers Azure Functions to process the order, update order records, and adjust inventory in Cosmos DB.
The function app updates cached session and cart data in Redis Cache and resolves any required downstream secrets from Key Vault.
The application emits telemetry to Azure Monitor, which forwards logs to Log Analytics for centralized observability.

metadata.prompt: A multi-region e-commerce system with Cosmos DB for global product catalog, Azure Front Door for traffic routing, Redis Cache for sessions, and Event Grid for order processing
